regime_read: ES & NQ moving together — broad agreement, more DURABLE directional signal. Trust the direction more.
narrative:
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (as of 2026-06-05 ~12:27 UTC). NOTE UP FRONT: This is NFP morning (8:30 ET high-impact print, days_until=0). Everything below is intelligence, not a validated edge — and my own scorecard is n=1 (CALIBRATING), so weight this accordingly.

1) MOVE-BY-MOVE READ. Both indices are soft into the print: ES -0.53% on the day / -0.46% on the week (last 7561, sitting essentially ON session VWAP 7562.74), NQ -1.16% day / -0.89% week (last 30136, just BELOW its VWAP 30168). The relative weakness in NQ is the tell — the 1-day NQ/ES spread is negative (-0.0063) even though the 20-day spread is mildly positive (+0.0012). That short-term tech underperformance lines up with the news mix: there is no clean bullish catalyst here. The tape is dominated by GEOPOLITICS headlines (Iran/Israel escalation chatter, U.S.-Iran export enforcement, AI-safety/authoritarian-regulation risk), plus a Broadcom earnings reference that is partial/unconfirmed in the feed. Read: this is a pre-data drift lower / de-risking session, not a momentum trend. RSI still constructive (ES 65.3, NQ 66.6) and both well above the 200-day (ES +9.8%, NQ +17.4%) — the larger structure is intact uptrend; the near-term is a pullback into an event.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ. ES: POC 7624.08, value area 7571.58–7626.58. Price (7561) is currently BELOW the value-area low — i.e. trading under the recent fair-value shelf, with HVNs stacked overhead (7584/7589/7601/7606/7624). That overhead volume is resistance the bulls must reclaim; until ES gets back above ~7571.5 (VAL) it's working in the lower-volume tail. NQ: POC 30569, value area 30319.18–30711.78. NQ (30136) is well BELOW value-area low and below its 5-day price range mid — clearly the weaker leg, parked near the prior-week / prior-day low cluster at 30151. The line in the sand for NQ is the 30151 swing low (prior day AND prior week low coincide there). Accumulation zone overhead is 30480–30676; that's where trapped longs / supply sits. CAVEAT: this is volume-at-price (WHERE it traded), NOT order-flow delta — no aggression read here.

3) LEAD-LAG / REGIME. Contemporaneous corr 0.854, best lag = 0 (corr 0.87), leader = NONE, divergence = FALSE. System tags this BREADTH: ES & NQ moving together, which normally makes the DIRECTIONAL signal more durable/trustworthy. The honest nuance: the regime is broad agreement, but the agreement right now is to the DOWNSIDE into NFP, with NQ leading weakness on the 1-day spread. So 'trust the direction more' cuts both ways — it argues against fading the soft tone aggressively, but it does NOT give me a clean trend to ride into an 8:30 print. Regime is an INPUT, not an edge (and per the note: ES/NQ is research only — no execution path).

4) EVENT CALENDAR. TODAY: Nonfarm Payrolls, 8:30 ET, high-impact — widen stops / size down (this is the single biggest factor in this briefing). Then CPI in ~7d (6/12) and FOMC in ~12d (6/17). Translation: this is a SIZE-DOWN, react-don't-predict morning. Pre-print positioning is low-conviction by construction; the report can invalidate any technical read in seconds. Cadence dates for NFP/CPI are estimates, FOMC is a seed — verify.

5) SYNTHESIS. Meta-regime: intact higher-timeframe uptrend (both above 200-day, RSI mid-60s) experiencing a near-term de-risking pullback into NFP, with NQ the weaker leg and below its value area. Lead-lag is clean (BREADTH, corr ~0.87) but the news is murky (geopolitics-heavy, no clear bullish driver) AND we are sitting on a high-impact data event — that combination FAILS my high-confidence test. Per my own rule, when news is muddy and we're event-blocked, confidence stays low. NARROWED BIAS: NEUTRAL into the print, ~38% conviction, with a slight watch-for-defense-of-the-low lean (NQ holding 30151 keeps the structural uptrend alive and would favor a post-data dip-buy; a clean break and acceptance below 30151 flips the near-term character bearish toward the lower profile tail). INVALIDATION for any constructive/dip-buy interpretation: NQ below 30151 (prior-day & prior-week low). I am not taking a directional stance ahead of 8:30 ET — size down, widen stops, let the print resolve the BREADTH direction, then trade the reaction off the 30151 / VAL levels. Confidence deliberately capped given the unproven scorecard (n=1).

ES=F.limitation: Volume profile = WHERE volume traded (volume-at-price). NOT order-flow delta (buy/sell aggression). True delta needs a CME order-flow feed (Databento/CQG).

NQ=F.limitation: Volume profile = WHERE volume traded (volume-at-price). NOT order-flow delta (buy/sell aggression). True delta needs a CME order-flow feed (Databento/CQG).

scorecard_summary: Briefing scorecard: n=1 dir-calls, hit 1.0, regime acc 0.5 — CALIBRATING — need ~30-60 samples before the hit-rate/calibration mean anything
bias: size to regime: trust direction more in BREADTH, less in CONCENTRATION; ROTATION_WARN = treat tech-led longs as suspect

provenance.note: Analyst/Oracle journal — qualitative regime context + a self-scored directional call, NOT a verified data feed or validated edge. Numbers here are never ingested as trading inputs.
